original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of a fresco depicting a crowded scene of robed figures, possibly biblical or historical, gathered outdoors. In the upper left background, a large, dark, bell-shaped or bell-bottomed object is depicted in the sky.

Black-and-white photograph of a circular religious icon depicting "The Resurrection of our Lord Jesus Christ". A central figure (Jesus) is shown ascending or rising above a tomb, surrounded by soldiers and other figures. The scene is set within a landscape with buildings in the background. The object labeled as "The House of the Lord" in the text is depicted in the upper portion of the icon as a large, dark, circular or bell-shaped object in the sky.

Black-and-white photograph of a fresco or mural painting showing a group of figures, possibly angels or saints, with large wings, clustered together and appearing to fly or be carried towards the left. They are depicted against a dark background with some architectural elements visible.

elements.description: A black-and-white photograph depicting a religious fresco. It shows several haloed figures, with a central figure appearing to float or ascend. To the right is a dark, multi-tiered architectural structure with small figures. A star symbol is visible to the right of the structure. Text below the image reads: 'Fresco in the Dechany Monastery (Yugoslavia). The angels look as if they were flying in spacecraft.'

A black-and-white photograph depicting a religious icon. It shows a central, haloed figure on a cross or tree-like structure, surrounded by numerous other figures in a complex scene. A star symbol is visible to the right of the image. Text below the image reads: 'The icon, "The Resurrection of our Lord Jesus Christ". (17th century) from the Moscow Theological Academy. "The House of the Lord" resembles a space ship.'

A black-and-white photograph depicting a religious fresco or icon. It shows a central, haloed figure seated or standing, surrounded by other figures. To the left is a dark, multi-tiered architectural structure with small figures. A star symbol is visible to the right of the structure.

judge.reason: The descriptions disagree on key visual elements (e.g., the central figure's pose, presence of a cross, presence of a star) and on the specific quoted text within the images.
